description: Hide or un-hide all liner elements in the range. By default, commands that use a range filter will skip hidden objects. This can be overruled with the use-hidden keyword in the range specification.

keywords.name: adummy
keywords.description: If on is specified, all elements in the range are hidden. If off , all elements in the range are un-hidden (shown), and the use-hidden keyword is applied to the range implicitly. on is the default if no keyword is given.

keywords.name: undo
keywords.description: Reverse the operation of the last structure liner hide command. The program keeps a maximum undo stack of size 12.
